pwa.updateDescription: A new version of the app is ready.

share.confirmDescription: The link includes performer names, the show name, and cast assignments. It stays in the URL until cleared. Only share it with people who should see that information.
share.importInvalidDescription: This share link is invalid or out of date.
share.importFullDescription: You already have the maximum number of saved shows. Delete one, then open the link again.
share.tooLargeTitle: Show is too large to share
share.tooLargeDescription: This show has too much data for a share link. Try removing performers or scenes first.
share.encodeFailedDescription: Something went wrong while building the link. Try again.
share.copyFailedDescription: Your browser blocked clipboard access. Copy the address bar after sharing again, or check browser permissions.

footer.credit: Made with love by <authorLink>Scott Blinch</authorLink>. Give feedback on <githubLink>GitHub</githubLink>. Free to share and remix — just keep it free (<licenseLink>GPL-2.0</licenseLink>). <privacyLink>Privacy</privacyLink>.
footer.authorLinkAria: Scott Blinch's website (opens in new tab)

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.localStorage: Show data is stored only in your browser. This app does not upload your shows to a server or create accounts. There is no cloud backup—clearing site data, uninstalling the app, or using a different browser or device will remove your saved shows.
privacy.shareLinks: When you share a show, performer names and cast assignments are encoded in the link. Anyone with that link can open the show. Only share links with people who should see that information. Shared links always show the generic app title in chat previews, not the show name.
privacy.hosting: This site is hosted on GitHub Pages. GitHub may log basic access data (such as IP address and requested URL) as part of normal web hosting.

workspace.duplicateDescription: Creates a copy with the same roster, lineup, and cast assignments. The copy opens as a new saved show.
workspace.deleteDescription: This permanently removes this saved show. This cannot be undone.
workspace.deleteLastDescription: This is your last saved show. Deleting it clears the workspace until you create a new show.
workspace.emptyDescription: Create a show to get started.
workspace.emptyBlurb: Build your roster, plan scenes, assign hosts and players, then print or share your running order. Everything stays in your browser—no account and no cloud backup.

roster.heading: Roster
roster.castingHelp: On desktop, drag performers into scene slots or assign cast using the Assign host and Add player menus in each scene. On mobile, use the dropdown menus in each scene. Roster drag is a pointer shortcut only.
roster.emptyDescription: Add someone above to start building your roster.
roster.roleCountHost: Host in {count, plural, one {# scene} other {# scenes}}
roster.roleCountPlayer: Player in {count, plural, one {# scene} other {# scenes}}
roster.hostBadgeTooltip: {name} hosts {count, plural, one {# scene} other {# scenes}}
roster.playerBadgeTooltip: {name} plays in {count, plural, one {# scene} other {# scenes}}
roster.renameDescription: Update how this person appears in the roster and scene slots.
roster.markAbsentDescription: They will stay in assigned scene slots with a warning style, but cannot be dragged into new slots until cleared.
roster.deleteDescriptionNoAssignments: They will be permanently removed from the roster.
roster.deleteDescriptionWithAssignments: Choose whether to remove their scene assignments or keep them as warning slots in the show.
roster.deleteKeepSlots: Remove from roster, keep scene slots
roster.deleteClearScenes: Remove from roster and all scenes

lineup.heading: Lineup
lineup.reorderHelp: On desktop, drag scenes to reorder. On mobile, use the up and down buttons on each scene card.
lineup.emptyDescription: Add a scene above to start building the lineup.
lineup.dropHostZone: {name} — host drop zone. Drag a performer here or use Assign host.
lineup.dropPlayersZone: {name} — players drop zone. Drag performers here or use Add player.
lineup.renameDescription: Update how this scene appears in the lineup and printout.
lineup.removeDescription: This removes the scene and all host and player assignments for it.
lineup.allPlayDescription: This removes {count, plural, one {# assigned player} other {# assigned players}} from {sceneName} and marks the scene as all play.

show.detailsDescription: Set the show name, date, time, and venue for the header and printout. Leave the name blank to use "Untitled Show".
